name: Chilie Cheese Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Sharp cheddar cheese, large cubes (at room temperature)
recipeInstructions:
1. Squeeze the canned chopped green chilies between layers of paper towels to remove excess moisture. If using, add about 1/2 tsp ground red pepper instead.
2. In a bread machine, pour in all ingredients except cheese and chilies in the order listed (or if your machine takes wet ingredients first, reverse the order).
3. Select white bread setting and start the machine.
4. After the first knead at the beeps, add the chopped green chilies and shredded cheddar cheese.
5. Once baking is complete, brush the crust with margarine or butter.
6. Enjoy this best toasted.
